mapper.insert:
select seq_board.nextval from dual
insert into board( board_no, title, writer, content, reg_date )values( #{boardNo}, #{title}, #{writer}, #{content}, sysdate )
mapper.select: select board_no, title, writer, content, reg_date from board order by board_no desc
select board_no, title, writer, content, reg_date from board where board_no = ${value}

select board_no, title, writer, content, reg_date from board where 1=1
and title like '%'||${title}||'%'
order by board_no desc
